# testapp2 Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-17

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 22 LTS for backend, modern browser ES2022 for frontend) + Express (API), Zod (validation), React + Vite (UI), Axios/Fetch wrapper, OpenAPI tooling (001-weather-lookup)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 22 LTS for backend, modern browser ES2022 for frontend): Follow standard conventions

- 001-weather-lookup: Added TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 22 LTS for backend, modern browser ES2022 for frontend) + Express (API), Zod (validation), React + Vite (UI), Axios/Fetch wrapper, OpenAPI tooling
